meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [3.0.0] - 24-03-04

### Changed

- Replaced the previous description of process steps (Property 'processes') with Shared.bill_of_process (referencing MP's model) (Property 'billOfProcess')

## [2.0.0] - 2023-12-04

- Standardization of Request for Quotation exclusively for individual parts.
- No longer a need for a detailed parts list.

## [1.0.0] - 2023-10-30

### Added

- initial model

### Changed

n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: RequestForQuotation
nodes.description: The request for quotation represents the data structure to configure a manufacturing request and send this to a supplier receive a quotation

nodes.label: rfqIdentification
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: rfqConfiguration
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: rfqSender
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: cxHeader
nodes.description: header information by Catena-X

nodes.label: rfqSource
nodes.description: RFQ-Identification: digital address of the sender (e.g.token, IP address, link, user account)

nodes.label: rfqId
nodes.description: RFQ-Identification: internal identifier in user account

nodes.label: rfqName
nodes.description: RFQ-Identification: name for the request for user account management (usually name of the product to be manufactured)

nodes.label: rfqDateTime
nodes.description: RFQ-Identification: date and time of the request in user account

nodes.label: rfqVersion
nodes.description: RFQ-Identification: version of this request in case there were any changes

nodes.label: cadFile
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: CAD file as geometry definition, e.g. step file

nodes.label: parts
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: list of parts contained in the CAD file

nodes.label: firstDeliveryDate
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: Date of desired, first, but not must delivery

nodes.label: lastDeliveryDate
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: date of required and last acceptable delivery

nodes.label: additionalComments
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: placeholder for any kind of additional comments

nodes.label: additionalFiles
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: in case there are additional documents or files to share (like e.g. technical drawings)

nodes.label: orderQuantity
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: quantity at all, valid for complete order (usually number of products to be ordered)

nodes.label: senderName
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: name of the sender

nodes.label: senderAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender

nodes.label: senderCompanyName
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, company name of sender

nodes.label: senderEMail
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, e-mail address of sender

nodes.label: senderPhoneNumber
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, phone number of sender

nodes.label: senderAccountAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender for account

nodes.label: senderDeliveryAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender for delivery

nodes.label: deliveryRequirements
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: filled by customer, any kind of delivery requirements

nodes.label: fileType
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: file format

nodes.label: filePath
nodes.description: path or address to the file

nodes.label: fileName
nodes.description: name of the file

nodes.label: fileObject
nodes.description: the file object itself, in case this could be sent via the API

nodes.label: partId
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: identifier of the part from CAD File

nodes.label: partName
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: name of the part in CAD file. In case the CAD file has only one part, this could also be the file name.

nodes.label: manufacturingDomain
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: domain of required process (e.g. subtractive manufacturing, additive manufacturing, assembly)

nodes.label: processes
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: list of processes related to the manufacturing domain (subtractive Manufacturing: milling, drilling, surface treatment; additive manufacturing: powder bed fusion, heat treatment, surface finishing; assembly: welding,...).These process steps might also be hierarchical (milling:roughing, milling:finishing,...

nodes.label: generalTolerance
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: selection of defined tolerance classes

nodes.label: additionalRequirements
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: specific requirements e.g. to guarantee quality, like premium quality check or standard quality check or test part required (makes only sense for batch)

nodes.label: material
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: material definition with further information

nodes.label: partQuantity
nodes.description: RFQ-PartConfiguration: Quantity of which the part item is assembled into the parent item (within the CAD File). In general it is '1' for serialized parts.

nodes.label: quantityNumber
nodes.description: The number of objects related to the measurement unit

nodes.label: measurementUnit
nodes.description: Unit of Measurement for the quantity of serialized objects

nodes.label: processStepIdentifier
nodes.description: specific process step identifier within the level of detail. Must be unique! (this is the identifier to reference to)

nodes.label: subProcessSteps
nodes.description: list of specific process step identifiers for the next level of detail (reference from the SetOfProcessSteps list)

nodes.label: processProperties
nodes.description: property related to the specified process, e.g. for coloring, the property would be the color: black

nodes.label: materialProperties
nodes.description: material definition with additional detail properties with name, value and value type, like name= density, value=2.7, type=g/m3 or name= chemical term, value=AlMgMn, type=periodic table

nodes.label: materialFamily
nodes.description: definition of material family for preselection

nodes.label: value
nodes.description: value to detail the part material item

nodes.label: valueType
nodes.description: value type to specify the value of the property

nodes.label: propertyName
nodes.description: name of the property

nodes.label: RFQIdentificationCharacteristic
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQConfigurationCharacteristic
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQSenderCharacteristic
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: CXHeaderCharacteristic
nodes.description: header information by Catena-X

nodes.label: SourceCharacteristic
nodes.description: digital address of the sender (e.g.token, IP address, link, user account)

nodes.label: IdCharacteristic
nodes.description: internal identifier in user account

nodes.label: NameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name for the request for user account management (usually name of the part to be manufactured)

nodes.label: DateTimeCharacteristic
nodes.description: date and time of the request in user account

nodes.label: RFQVersionCharacteristic
nodes.description: version of this request in case there were any changes

nodes.label: FileCharacteristic
nodes.description: CAD file as geometry definition, e.g. step file

nodes.label: SetOfPartsCharacteristic
nodes.description: list of parts contained in the CAD file, to be defined in RFQ configuration

nodes.label: DeliveryDateCharacteristic
nodes.description: delivery date

nodes.label: CommentCharacteristic
nodes.description: placeholder for any kind of additional comments

nodes.label: SetOfFilesCharacteristic
nodes.description: in case there are additional documents or files to share

nodes.label: OrderQuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: quantity to be ordered

nodes.label: SenderNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the sender

nodes.label: SenderAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender

nodes.label: SenderCompanyNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: company name of sender

nodes.label: SenderEMailCharacteristic
nodes.description: e-mail address of sender

nodes.label: SenderPhoneNumberCharacteristic
nodes.description: phone number of sender

nodes.label: SenderAccountAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender for account

nodes.label: SenderDeliveryAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender for delivery

nodes.label: DeliveryRequirementsCharacteristic
nodes.description: any kind of delivery requirements

nodes.label: FileTypeCharacteristic
nodes.description: file format

nodes.label: FilePathCharacteristic
nodes.description: path or address to the file

nodes.label: FileNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the file

nodes.label: FileObjectCharacteristic
nodes.description: the file object itself, in case this could be sent via the API

nodes.label: PartIdCharacteristic
nodes.description: identifier of the part from CAD File

nodes.label: PartNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the part in CAD file. In case the CAD file has only one part, this could also be the file name

nodes.label: ManufacturingDomainCharacteristic
nodes.description: domain of required process (e.g. subtractive manufacturing, additive manufacturing, assembly)

nodes.label: SetOfProcessStepsCharacteristic
nodes.description: depending on the manufacturing domain there are several process steps to be done. These process steps might also be hierarchical.

nodes.label: GeneralToleranceCharacteristic
nodes.description: selection of defined tolerance classes

nodes.label: AdditionalQualityRequirementsCharacteristic
nodes.description: specific requirements to guarantee quality

nodes.label: MaterialCharacteristic
nodes.description: material definition with further information

nodes.label: PartQuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the quantity in which the part item is assembled in the given parent item by providing a quantity value and the measurement unit in which the quantity is measured.

nodes.label: ProcessStepIdentifierCharacteristic
nodes.description: specific process step identifier within the level of detail

nodes.label: SetOfSubProcessStepsCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: set of sub process steps characteristic
nodes.description: list of specific process step identifiers within the next level of detail

nodes.label: SetOfProcessPropertyCharacteristic
nodes.description: additional properties based on the process item

nodes.label: SetMaterialPropertiesCharacteristic
nodes.description: set of property data to detail material properties

nodes.label: PartMaterialGroupCharacteristic
nodes.description: definition of material group for preselection

nodes.label: ValueCharacteristic
nodes.description: value to detail the part material item

nodes.label: ValueTypeCharacteristic
nodes.description: value type to specify the property value

nodes.label: PropertyNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the property

nodes.label: RFQIdentificationData
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQConfigurationData
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQSenderData
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: FileData
nodes.description: file data information including optionally the file object itself, or how to get access to the file by filePath, fileName and fileType

nodes.label: PartObject
nodes.description: part contained in the CAD file, to be defined in RFQ configuration

nodes.label: Quantity
nodes.description: Comprises the number of objects and the unit of measurement for the respective child objects

nodes.label: File
nodes.description: a file in a defined format (fileType)

nodes.label: ProcessSteps
nodes.description: process steps specifying the processes by identifier and process properties (might also be a list of properties) and a list of subprocesses and including further sub processes (set of process data)

nodes.label: MaterialData
nodes.description: object with all information about material of a part to be manufactured

nodes.label: Property
nodes.description: property is used to detail the description by several items with name, value and value type
